evals.name: draft-feature-prd-artifacts
evals.prompt: Let's plan a new feature for taskpilot: recurring tasks (daily/weekly schedules, with skip and pause). I've already made these calls: schedules are stored as RRULE strings on the task; occurrences are generated lazily when the app runs (no background jobs); lookahead is capped at 1 year. Use whatever doc structure you think is best and go ahead and draft the feature PRD now — don't wait for me.
evals.expected_output: Handles briefless entry gracefully (user brought their decisions): creates a namespaced planning space (docs/better-planning/...) without clobbering the existing docs/plans/old-roadmap.md; feature PRD at product/features/recurring-tasks/recurring-tasks-prd.md (stem-named) with status header, contracts, acceptance criteria, edge cases, and a decisions table containing the three given decisions marked as user-made; a self-contained companion recurring-tasks-prd-overview.html ending with a 'things to poke at' section; GLOSSARY.md and README.md map created/updated.
files: fixtures/taskpilot — small CLI app with legacy docs/plans/old-roadmap.md
assertions: namespaced-stem-named-prd: a feature PRD exists at docs/better-planning/product/features/recurring-tasks/recurring-tasks-prd.md (namespaced layout, stem-named file)

companion-html-self-contained-with-poke-at: a companion *-prd-overview.html exists next to the PRD, contains no external http(s) resource references (self-contained), and ends with an open-questions / things-to-poke-at section
decisions-table-captures-user-calls: the PRD contains a decisions table including all three user-given decisions (RRULE storage, lazy on-run generation, 1-year lookahead cap)
legacy-docs-untouched: docs/plans/old-roadmap.md is byte-identical to the fixture version
glossary-and-map-exist: docs/better-planning/GLOSSARY.md and docs/better-planning/README.md (with a status index) both exist
prd-structure-complete: the PRD has a status header (Status/Depends/Companion) plus acceptance criteria and edge cases sections
